feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How we connect SAP Build Apps with PostgreSQL.
entry.content: I am created an application with SAP Build App. But, I don't know how to connect SAP Build App with PostgreSQL.

entry.title: Work Zone My Inbox / Task Center: solution to get Open Task to generate a URL accessible through WZ
entry.content:
When the user navigates to "Open Task" and the task is configured to show details in a Web Dynpro ABAP application then the backend system generates a URL pointing to that backend system directly. For a seamless experience, it not only requires that backend to be exposed on the internet (with or without a gateway system), but also requires SAML2 to be setup. It defeats the purpose of Work Zone being the internet facing portal making backend applications accessible via the SAP Cloud Connector.

Is there a solution offered by SAP that allows the Open Task action to lead to a URL that is accessible within Work Zone itself?

Similar question here from a while back, but in the context of the Fiori Launchpad service with no solution: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/fiori-inbox-cloud-default-webgui-wda/qaq-p/12514253

I hope it's supported. If it's not, then I plan to explore enhancing the class that generates the URL and return a link to WZ targetting the Shell-startWDA intent.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start - Deactivate button
entry.content:
Hi,

We use SAP Mobile Start in combination with SAP BTP Build Work Zone. We are also using the notifications within SAP Mobile Start.

So if a new item arrives, the end user will receive a notification in SAP Mobile Start. They then click on the notification and see a so called "first screen". There is a reject (afwijzen) button on this first screen as you can see in de picture.

Does anyone know how I could deactivate this button? It should not be visible to the end user.

Best regards,

Gene

entry.title: Exposed SAP S/4HANA Federated content in SAP Workzone give Internal Server Error
entry.content:
Hi,
I have followed the below tutorial to expose my S/4HANA system fiori applications to SAP Workzone.
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-launchpad-federation-expose-content.html 
S/4HANA system details:
version : 2023
UI5:
Workzone:1.129.0
S/4HANA:1.120.0.

The apps are visible in Work-zone as tiles, but when I open , it gives "Internal Server error".
Not sure whether the workzone and S/4HANA UI5 versions should be same

1. Workzone

2. After opening the app

3. Network tab

Updated

4. Console error


Updated
Destination details

Design-Time

Runtime

Runtime

entry.title: MyInbox in the SAP Build Work Zone lists tasks, but does not display them.
entry.content:
I have subscribet to SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Workzone in the same Subaccount. 

On my Work Zone Site i added the Process Trigger and MyInbox component. The Process Trigger works fine but MyInbox isn't working correctly. It lists the assigend Task of an User on the left menue but nothing happens when i click on them to work on the forms.

I created an Destination on the subaccount für SAP Build Process Automation in preparation for MyInbox on Work Zone.

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Workzone BPA task error "Failed to resolve dependencies of 'CrossApplicationNavigation.js'"
entry.content:
Dear Community,
since Monday I can’t see custom tasks in Workzone in some clients' sub-accounts.

The error I see in the browser console is:
Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/ushell/appRuntime/ui5/services/CrossApplicationNavigation.js'

Tasks are correctly viewable on use MyInbox of BPA.

Does anyone else have this error?

@Archana Could it be due to some update over the weekend?

Best Regards

entry.title: Build Work Zone | Server IP address could not found
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have requirement to expose application to internet for which we have created Work Zone site and trying to expose On Premise application, Exposed Application Tiles are appearing in Work Zone site but when we are trying to access those we are getting below error message, Kindly help in identifying solution / root cause.

Thanks,

Khalid.

entry.title: Custom SAP BTP Workzone Maintaince mode
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I've a requirement to enable maintenance mode for the BTP User by period (user will be locked during period) And need to show a custom message to user to inform site is under maintenance

As far as i know for now we don't have maintenance mode for sap btp workzone services it still on idea of SAP
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/295127

So, could u give me advice or do we've other way (instead of custom in UI5 apps)

entry.title: Design Your Site With the New SAP Build Work Zone Experience last step not working
entry.content:
i followed this tutorial step by step but cant get the descriped functionality out of the last step. it just shows the blank mainpage that was already available.

Does anyone have a solution or idea why this doesnt work as described?

entry.title: HTML5 App is not visible in SaaS consumer subaccount
entry.content:
The question below was originally posted as a GitHub issue: https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-developer-guide-cap/issues/116 

I am following the tutorial : Implement Multitenancy in a Full-Stack CAP Application Following SAP BTP Developer’s Guide, and I am now at the last step: Subscribe to the Application.
I am using a trial account and have created a new consumer subaccount in the same region as the provider subaccount.

Issue

Although the subscription was successful, the HTML5 application is not visible from the consumer subaccount.

 

I have configured destinations, and the tile is visible in the consumer's Work Zone site.

However, when I press the tile, the app keeps loading, and I see that fetching ui5AppInfo.json is failing with a 404 error.

The dependency viewer shows the following status.

Any suggestions on what might be missing?

The source code is uploaded to the following repository in the "multitenancy" branch.
https://github.com/miyasuta/incident-management-2410/tree/multitenancy

entry.title: How we can filter Odata data in SAP BUILD APP.
entry.content:
I got data in SAP BUILD APP with Odata URL. But now I want to know how we can filter only selected
data (UserID, Employee Name) in SAP BUILD APP.

entry.title: Cant access transaction in WEBGui for HTML via SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

i am trying to set up SAP build work zone to access SAP Gui transactions but i get this message when I try to open the App i created for my Website.

This is the app im trying to open:

 

Destination im using for the System in BTP

Cloud Connector connection config Cloud to on Prem:

 

Regards

Rouven

entry.title: Getting issue in running automation
entry.content:
i have already updated the agent's sdk version. I even tried with the same version given still every time getting same issue

 

SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation SAP Workforce Performance Builder, desktop edition# SAP Process Integration

entry.title: Migration from SAP central fiori launchpad to SAP BTP Central Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently we are using SAP Fiori Central Launchpad Deployed as Central Hub System on HEC as central entry point for SAP Systems. Now we are planning it to Migrate to SAP BTP central Launchpad and for the same i am given the Project to list down the Benefits of moving from SAP Fiori Central Launchpad to SAP BTP central Launchpad. Could you help me to note down the points as per my organization SAP Architecture so that we can start the migration.

entry.title: How to view custom apps created in s/4hana cloud at work zone.
entry.content:
Hi. I need your help.

I have subscried and set up the work zone(standard, free version) on BTP to use mobile start.

And I have integrated s/4hana cloud and work zone.

In the same space as s/4hana cloud launchpad, I can see the original apps, but I can't see the all custom apps(created with custom bo, custom query, etc.)

How can I see the custom apps?

entry.title: SAP Build Workzone Std ed Free limit reached with just one admin
entry.content:
Hi,

I just created a SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Free tier under our PAYG global account. My surprise is that just after assigning launchpad_administrator role to my user, I got the free tier limit message immediately. 

Any idea what I did wrong? I have a trial global account assigned to the same SAP UID with another Build workzone. Just one admin is assigned there, though.

Thx for your help,

David R.

entry.title: CAP after deploy app not showing in Build Work Zone
entry.content: After deploying my App, it wont show up in Build Work Zone's Content Explorer but no Error or logs anywhere

entry.title: Taskcenter does not receive S4 task notifications
entry.content:
Hello team !

We are having the following issue, we have integrated S/4HANA with SAP Task Center + Mobile Start, everything work as expected but, in the Task Center the Notifications of new tasks are not being displayed in the bell in the page header.

User notifications for taskcenter tasks are not being displayed. When a Purchase Order Approval workflow task is sent to users, the notification is not presented in the workzone. 

The notification is working normally through Fiori's Myinbox.

Only in the workzone that is not working properly. 

The following configurations were made as described in the manual below:

Receiving SAP S/4HANA Workflow Notifications
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/Setting-Up-SAP-Build-Work-Zone-standard-edition-and-SAP-Mobile-Start-with-SAP-S-4HANA/explaining-the-setup-for-sap-s-4hana

Enabling Notifications From SAP S/4HANA
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/enabling-notifications-from-sap-s-4hana?locale=en-US

Enable Notifications for End Users
https://help.sap.com/docs/task-center/sap-task-center/enable-notifications-for-end-users

When performing a test of sending a notification through the transaction /n/IWNGW/BEP_DEMO it is displayed in the Fiori myinbox correctly, but it is not displayed in the workzone. 

When accessing the /N/IWFND/ERROR_LOG log, the following message is presented: "The remote service triggered a client error '400': 'Bad Request'"

Any tip is valid, thank you !!!

entry.title: Mobile Start - How to Display PO Information on the Task Card
entry.content:
Hello Team !

I would like to know what procedure to be carried out so that the purchase order release tasks present the information of the items and total value of the order.

To represent my question, please see the attached file, which presents the current mobile start screen and a screen that I took from the mobile start documentation.

any tip is valid, thank you !!

entry.title: Wokzone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have Created workzone site and exposed On-Prem apps and the tile are appearing in the workzone site but when we try to access the application we are getting the error as "s4** server IP address could not be found" and When I try to access the site inside VDI am facing the issue as SAML2 error.

Thanks in Advance

@Juliuspereira  @Khalid_Desai  @WouterLemaire 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/build-work-zone-server-ip-address-could-not-found/qaq-p/13895298/comment-id/4888955#M4888955

your previous post is very helpful,

kindly guide me with the issue.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP
